## Type

Select one:

- [ ] New Skill
- [ ] Skill update by original author
- [ ] Derived Skill with attribution
- [ ] Governance or charter change
- [ ] Translation update
- [ ] Automation/script change
- [ ] Documentation change

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change? -->

## For Skill PRs

- Skill path:
- Author in frontmatter:
- Does this keep the author at 5 or fewer active Skills?
- If derived from another Skill, original source/author:

## Governance Impact

<!-- Does this change rules, author rights, resurrection, lifecycle, revenue, or automation behavior? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `README.md` / `README.en.md`.
- [ ] I read `CHARTER.md` / `CHARTER.en.md`.
- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md` or `CONTRIBUTING.zh-CN.md`.
- [ ] My commits include DCO sign-off (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] I preserved attribution for quoted or derived work.
- [ ] For translations, I preserved the meaning of the Chinese source text or clearly marked uncertainty.
